profile.name: Surjit Singh
profile.title: AI Infrastructure & LLM Platform Engineer
profile.summary: AI/ML & Python Engineer with 4+ years of experience building scalable LLM platforms and distributed ML systems. Proven ability to modernize legacy architectures, integrate AI into production, and drive significant 27% cloud cost reduction and 30% API latency reduction. Expertise in GPU infrastructure, Kubernetes orchestration, and end-to-end ML/LLM pipeline development.

achievements: Built self-hosted LLM platform (vLLM, Ollama, PyTorch, Chroma) with SSO & RBAC
Deployed GPU workloads on Kubernetes enabling scalable ML & LLM inference
Automated distributed training & deployment using Ray
Integrated AI workflows into legacy & new applications
27% Cloud Cost Savings
30% API Latency Reduction
5 Systems Modernized
Developed and optimized deep learning NLP models (BERT/Huggingface)
Improved BERT F1 score from 71 to 91 through model optimization
Reduced inference time by 20% through quantization and batch processing
Built Python REST APIs using Flask and FastAPI
Prepared and processed multilingual datasets
Developed Python-based backend solutions using Flask
Contributed to front-end integration and API development
Built RESTful APIs for client applications
